title: Introducing OpenThorn — Build Full-Stack Apps from a Single Prompt
excerpt: Most web apps still take weeks to build. We built OpenThorn to close that gap — describe your app in plain language and ship the same day.

title: What Is a BYOK AI Website Builder?
excerpt: A BYOK (bring-your-own-key) AI website builder is a tool that generates websites with AI while you connect your own API key from a provider like OpenAI or Anthropic — so you pay the provider directly, with no platform markup or subscription.

title: How to Build a Website with AI Using Your Own API Key
excerpt: Build and deploy a complete website with AI for cents, not subscriptions: get an API key, connect it to OpenThorn, describe what you want, and ship — in six steps.

howTo.name: Build a website with AI using your own API key

steps.name: Choose an AI provider and get an API key
steps.text: Pick any of the 17 supported providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, and more) and generate an API key in its developer console.

steps.name: Create a free OpenThorn account
steps.text: Sign up at openthorn.app — free, no credit card, no subscription.

steps.name: Connect your API key
steps.text: Paste the key on the Providers page; it is encrypted server-side with AES-256-GCM.

steps.name: Describe the website you want
steps.text: Create a project and describe the site in plain language; the agent generates real React code.

steps.name: Preview and iterate
steps.text: Use the in-browser live preview and ask for changes conversationally until it is right.

steps.name: Deploy or export
steps.text: Deploy to Netlify in one click, or export the full source code and host it anywhere.

title: How to Get an AI API Key (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini)
excerpt: A five-minute guide to creating an API key with OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google Gemini — including billing setup and the spend limits that keep costs predictable.

steps.name: Create a provider account
steps.text: Sign up at platform.openai.com, console.anthropic.com, or aistudio.google.com.

steps.name: Add billing
steps.text: Add a payment method or prepaid credit (Gemini offers a free tier without billing).

steps.name: Generate the key
steps.text: Create a new secret key in the provider's API keys section and copy it — it is shown only once.

steps.name: Set a spend limit
steps.text: Configure a monthly budget in the provider dashboard so usage can never surprise you.

title: The Best BYOK AI Website Builders in 2026
excerpt: Most AI builders resell AI usage as credits. These tools let you bring your own API key instead — OpenThorn, bolt.diy, and Dyad compared, plus how they differ from Lovable, Bolt.new, and v0.
